title: soudarion #4676
definition:
1) a handkerchief
 2) a cloth for wiping perspiration from the face and for cleaning
    the nose and also used in swathing the head of a corpse
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a handkerchief
 2) a cloth for wiping perspiration from the face and for cleaning
    the nose and also used in swathing the head of a corpse

    NASB:  a handkerchief, a head cloth  (for the dead):
